name: maestro
description: Master orchestrator for Claude Code — classifies tasks, fetches live docs via Context7, generates approved design mockups before frontend implementation, enforces layered security (OWASP checklists + real-time edit scanning), visual verification via Playwright, deep PR review with specialist agents, surfaces cross-session context via claude-mem observations, composes with an extended plugin ecosystem (UI UX Pro Max, frontend-design, n8n-MCP, VoiceMode, Everything Claude Code, LightRAG), and orchestrates superpowers skills in the correct order.
